creator: scheidell@secnap.net
text:
Needed to back out the pkg-plist(.client) patches because they left files over after pkg delete.
This final patch compiles and deletes just fine.
tinderbox log:
<http://lorie.secnap.net/tb/logs/8-scheidell_AMD64/bacula-server-5.2.3.log>

dependency client even compiles fine.
<http://lorie.secnap.net/tb/logs/8-scheidell_AMD64/bacula-client-5.2.3.log>

Awaiting maintainers approval.

--
